name: Boti Gosht- Meat Cubes - India
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 fresh hot green chili, finely sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add ginger and garlic; stir until fragrant.
3. Add curry leaves and brown the garlic for about 1 minute.
4. Add meat cubes and stir occasionally.
5. Stir in garam masala, cumin, turmeric, cayenne pepper, green chili, and salt.
6. Pour in lemon juice (or to taste).
7. Cover pan and cook gently on medium-low heat for 50 minutes.
8. Uncover the pan, reduce liquid by boiling down, and continue cooking until meat is browned.
9. Stir in freshly ground black pepper.
10. Alternatively, use a pressure cooker: add water after all ingredients except black pepper and lemon juice, cover, bring to high pressure, then cook for 15 minutes at low heat.
11. Reduce pressure quickly with cool water, remove lid, and finish cooking uncovered until desired consistency is reached.
